summary: OBE: docs/assets/eclipse-stations-vs-penumbra-band.svg is already on main (commit bda7f5b, 2026-04-27T18:27:07Z) — pushed by workspace-sync ~11h before ISS-1650 was created. Asset verified: md5 matches in clone and workspace, station projection math reproduces (Ebro 444 km, Canary 4084 km — both match EXP-260 table exactly), and the section reference in sections.json .part4.html resolves correctly. No new files to commit. Recommend close with fix_date=2026-04-27T18:27:07Z, fixed_by=workspace-sync, resolved_reason="asset already present when issue was created". Also mark EXP-273 status=integrated.
context_for_decider: EXP-273 was a high-priority asset_creation expansion that turned out to be a no-op — the asset already existed. Pattern: curmudgeon c1 flagged the file as missing at 2026-04-27T07:37Z; workspace-sync committed it to main at 18:27Z; decider opened the issue at 2026-04-28T05:21Z without rechecking current main state. This is the same OBE pattern that Mode 2b handles in attention-inbox — recommending tinker consider adding a pre-create freshness check for asset_creation issues to avoid future false alarms.
sibling_holes_open: The same EXP-260 c1 review has five other holes (H1 H2 moderate; H3 H4 H5 H6 minor) that are NOT addressed by this proposal. If the decider has not already opened issues for them, recommend doing so — H1 (AE projection convention) and H2 (physical-altitude robustness) are the two highest-value follow-ups.
